hero.name: Dario Herrera
hero.description: I build scalable and innovative digital solutions using modern technologies. I specialize in web and mobile development, cloud architecture, and artificial intelligence to solve real-world problems and generate value.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.description: Software Engineer graduated from the National Polytechnic School, with experience in designing and developing scalable web and mobile applications. Throughout my career, I have worked across the entire software development lifecycle, gaining expertise in frontend and backend development, cloud technologies, and software architecture. Currently pursuing a Master’s degree in Applied Artificial Intelligence, with a focus on Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Transformer Architectures, and intelligent systems. Passionate about leveraging technology to build innovative, scalable, and impactful digital solutions that solve real-world challenges.

education.title: Education & Courses
education.subtitle: My academic background and continuous learning

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, interesting projects, or just having a chat about technology.

datafastTask.A: Development of microservices using: Node, TypeScript, Java, Spring, Quarkus.
datafastTask.B: Infrastructure as code generation using Terraform.
datafastTask.C: Development of mobile applications for Android platforms using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose.
datafastTask.D: Development of cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter.
datafastTask.E: Development and test coverage for front-end and back-end applications.
datafastTask.F: Management and publishing of Android applications on Google Play.
datafastTask.G: Continuous integration of mobile applications using Bitrise.
datafastTask.H: Use of various AWS resources: Lambda, Step Functions, DynamoDB, CloudWatch, CodeBuild, CodePipeline, S3, EC2, API Gateway, among others.

kushkiTask.A: Development of microservices using: TypeScript, Go, Python, RxJS, AWS, Serverless Framework.
kushkiTask.B: Development of micro-frontends with React using TypeScript, Single-spa Framework, Material-UI, and Redux.
kushkiTask.C: Use of AWS services such as: DynamoDB, System Manager, API Gateway, Lambda Functions, X-Ray, S3.

ioetTask.A: Development of native mobile applications for Android and iOS using Flutter and the BLoC pattern.
ioetTask.B: Development of web applications using Angular and NgRX.
ioetTask.C: Data consumption with REST and GraphQL.

pazminoTask.B: Analysis for the development of web applications.
pazminoTask.D: Development of web applications (PHP, HTML5, JavaScript, Bootstrap).
pazminoTask.G: Functional testing of systems in JavaEE.

projectDescriptions.goSpace: Aidra is spatial AI that transforms in-office collaboration by understanding your team's needs, autonomously bringing them together in the right space at the right time.
projectDescriptions.timeTracker: A web application developed for ioet's internal staff that expands the functionalities of the TSheets payment tool.
projectDescriptions.dish: A web system to control and plan employee nutrition. Manages roles for administrators and users to optimize catering costs.
projectDescriptions.home: A home automation system with hardware and software components for monitoring and controlling home rooms in real time via Android.
projectDescriptions.prediction: A web application that predicts mobility regulatory measures according to vehicle license plates from Ecuadorian territories.
projectDescriptions.news: A mobile application that delivers current world news with topics like General, Health, Technology, and Sports.
projectDescriptions.spoty: A web application that uses the Spotify API to list hits, search for songs and artists for playback.
projectDescriptions.rest: A dockerized REST API service for CRUD operations on software developers with their known technologies.
projectDescriptions.weather: A mobile application for current weather, 5-day history, and 7-day forecast.
projectDescriptions.protect: A REST API with authentication and route protection for cafeteria product management.
